page_title: Shinkansen: Everything about Evangelion Project 500 TYPE EVA
text:
is a Blu-ray (Catalog number VKSBD-101) created and published by Visual K Co., Ltd. on 22 July 2016. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/B01FJPB5M2/ 

Overview

The video focuses on scenes of the train in motion, and introduces not only the exterior of the train, but also the interior, where you can enjoy a "life-size cockpit boarding experience" themed on the world of Evangelion, photo spots, dioramas, and more. Also included are the 500 series trains from the 16-car formation that was used as the "Nozomi", to the 500 series that is now only in operation on the San'yō Shinkansen section. https://web.archive.org/web/20170206203334/http://www.evastore.jp/pc/index.php?toid=PC_ARTICLE&fromid=PC_ARTICLE_LIST&article_id=23392&category_id=8

Filming: 一条重哉 & Team-K (西本準治, 佐久開晚應, 今里清二, 北給出臣) 
Director: 角豆 
Producer: 小林哉
Production and Technology: Visual K Co., Ltd.
Production/author: EX-Q
